title: pedilonum coelandria
intro: Pedilonum coelandria, also known as Pedilonum coeladrium, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family, with its exact classification and common names being subject to ongoing research and identification. The plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly due to its root, which contains alkaloids that are believed to have analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Pedilonum coelandria are thought to include pain relief, reduction of inflammation, and alleviation of spasms, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Pedilonum coelandria is typically used in the form of dried roots or extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
